case_title: CARLOS MONGALO VS. ISLAND PARK STORAGE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2018 BY PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF CARLOS MONGALO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL WHITE, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE WAIVES SERVICE. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONGALO, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. FILED BY MONGALO, CARLOS ISLAND PARK STORAGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONGALO, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SERVED BUT UNSIGNED) SERVED SEP-07-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONGALO, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MONGALO, CARLOS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
